Hey <@925555155133415444>, nice to meet you.
I’ll be your main point of contact for communication, feedback, and any requests or updates going forward.

I’ll make sure everything is handled quickly and accurately.
There are two more steps we’ll need to go through.

Step one is Facebook setup, which is split into two parts. First, **access permissions**, where you’ll grant us access to your Facebook account. Second, Facebook payment setup. I’ll list both tutorials below in the correct order for you to follow.
1) Faceboook Access Setup: https://www.notion.so/evolutesolutionsio/How-to-Get-Proper-Access-into-Meta-Business-for-New-Client-2f750a671a8f80158236f5541026e21a?source=copy_link

Once those two steps are completed, we’ll give you access to our app and internal system. 
If you have any questions or need help at any point, just let me know. Here are the links below.

Here’s all the information you need for now:

Make sure that you can log into the software, downloaded the app on your phone, and connected your calendar into the software. Here’s the instructions to do so (make sure to look at step 3)

https://evolutesolutionsio.notion.site/Setting-Expectations-1ff50a671a8f8061a865d75f34e59972?source=copy_link
https://www.notion.so/1ff50a671a8f8061a865d75f34e59972?pvs=21
IMPORTANT - Lastly, please go through this tutorial on how to use the software. This is important to make sure we’re on the same page, and you understand how to use everything and exactly what’s going to happen with the leads (ex: what are we responsible for, what are you responsible for, etc)
https://evolutesolutionsio.notion.site/How-to-Use-the-Software-20050a671a8f8025905de484b7b534ec?source=copy_link
